title: 滾れホームランダービー！

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
While doing the rounds after school, I notice two
students chatting in a corner of the rooftop.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
I didn't tell anyone l was coming, just like you
asked. What's this important thing you have to
tell me?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Ahem... Are you familiar with the batting cages in
front of the station?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Yeah, of course. I go to those cages all the time.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Then are you also aware that the prize for
becoming the home run king this month is a ball
signed by Yutaka?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, everyone's talking about it. All the regulars
are gunning for that prize.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Then I have a request for you. I'd like you to
teach me some strength training techniques that'll
help me to hit home runs!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Interesting... You don't need any strength
training, though.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: What exactly do you mean?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Well, actually, I'm currently the home run king!
And I was gonna give you the ball when the
rankings are finalized!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
...My deepest apologies, but I'm afraid I cannot
accept the signed ball from you, as kind an offer
as that is.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Huh?! Wait... Why not, McQueen?!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
That ball is meant to reward one's efforts. To
accept such a reward without having made any
effort would be inexcusable. An Umamusume of
the Mejiro family could never.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
The victory, the glory, the signed ball... It is one's
own efforts that imbue these things with value!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: McQueen...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Yeah... You're right. You're totally right.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
We should battle each other to the best of our
abilities, and leave with no regrets... Now then, if
you'll excuse me.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Continuing my rounds, I spot Mejiro McQueen
again at the gym.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Right then, how shall I begin? Perhaps with some
dumbbell exercises?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
If it's dumbbells you're thinking of, some
single-arm rows would be good. They're great for
your lats.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Ryan... Why are you giving me advice? Do you
not wish to defend your position as the home run
king?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Nah, I don't plan on giving up my home run
crown. I'm here to train, y'know?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
I just want to take you on after you've trained
your glutes off! That's why I'm gonna give you all
the support I can!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Okay McQueen, let's hit the weights hard, get
ripped, and battle it out to see who's the true
home run king!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Hehe... Oh, Ryan...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
I can think of nothing I'd enjoy more! I shall make
you regret training me so well!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: That's the spirit!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
We're starting with five sets of thirty single-arm
rows!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The two Mejiros work up a huge sweat pumping
iron until the curfew forces them to return to their
dorms.
